name: LUXAR
short_description: In LUXAR, you control an extra-terrestrial luminescent organic entity that has just been born and must pass its first survival trials to show its adult peers that it deserves to grow among them.
detailed_description:
In LUXAR, you control an extra-terrestrial luminescent organic entity that has just been born and must pass its first survival trials to show its adult peers that it deserves to grow among them. It will have to cross 16 dark and hostile sectors with labyrinth-shaped alien architectures populated by toxic substances, obstacles, patrol drones and mechanisms of all kinds.
You are its only chance to make it happen...
about_the_game:
In LUXAR, you control an extra-terrestrial luminescent organic entity that has just been born and must pass its first survival trials to show its adult peers that it deserves to grow among them. It will have to cross 16 dark and hostile sectors with labyrinth-shaped alien architectures populated by toxic substances, obstacles, patrol drones and mechanisms of all kinds.
You are its only chance to make it happen...
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Japanese*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
